category.scope_note: Battery energy storage system compliance comparison.

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Peru INACAL NTP-IEC 62619 and NTP-IEC 62933 safety and performance, UN 38.3 transport, Osinergmin storage and grid-connection requirements, fire safety, 60 Hz design validation, and GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 baseline gaps.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与秘鲁INACAL NTP-IEC 62619和NTP-IEC 62933安全与性能、UN 38.3运输、Osinergmin储能及并网要求、消防安全、60 Hz设计验证以及GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基线差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與秘魯INACAL NTP-IEC 62619和NTP-IEC 62933安全與性能、UN 38.3運輸、Osinergmin儲能及併網要求、消防安全、60 Hz設計驗證以及GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基線差距對照。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Peru, the main requirements are: (1) IEC 62619 safety conformity for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial BESS applications (NTP-IEC 62619 adoption by INACAL is the reference framework); (2) IEC 62933 series for grid energy storage system performance and safety (NTP-IEC 62933 where adopted); (3) UN 38.3 transport testing for lithium cells and batteries; (4) 60 Hz validation for all PCS, transformers, and balance-of-system equipment; (5) Osinergmin technical approval and COES/SEIN grid-connection requirements for utility-scale storage projects. China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 documents support technical due diligence but do not replace Peru-specific conformity routes.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口秘鲁的主要要求：（1）工业BESS用二次锂电芯和电池的IEC 62619安全符合性（INACAL采用NTP-IEC 62619作为参考框架）；（2）电网侧储能系统性能和安全的IEC 62933系列（适用时参照NTP-IEC 62933）；（3）锂电芯和电池的UN 38.3运输测试；（4）所有PCS、变压器和辅助系统设备的60 Hz验证；（5）公用事业规模储能项目须取得Osinergmin技术审批及COES/SEIN并网批准。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代秘鲁特定合规路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口秘魯的主要要求：（1）工業BESS用二次鋰電芯和電池的IEC 62619安全符合性（INACAL採用NTP-IEC 62619作為參考框架）；（2）電網側儲能系統性能和安全的IEC 62933系列（適用時參照NTP-IEC 62933）；（3）鋰電芯和電池的UN 38.3運輸測試；（4）所有PCS、變壓器和輔助系統設備的60 Hz驗證；（5）公用事業規模儲能項目須取得Osinergmin技術審批及COES/SEIN併網批准。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代秘魯特定合規路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INACAL conformity determination, Osinergmin grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Peru INACAL, Osinergmin, MINEM, COES, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INACAL合规认定、Osinergmin并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行秘鲁INACAL、Osinergmin、MINEM、COES、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INACAL合規認定、Osinergmin併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行秘魯INACAL、Osinergmin、MINEM、COES、運輸及海關要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
